title: Version 2.3 — Results Engine
flowcharts:
flowchart TD
    stage["2.3.x Results Engine"]
    contract["Contract"]
    service["Service"]
    surface["Surface"]
    data["Data"]
    ops["Ops"]
    gate["Release gate"]
    stage --> contract --> gate
    stage --> service --> gate
    stage --> surface --> gate
    stage --> data --> gate
    stage --> ops --> gate

flowchart LR
    events["finder plus verifier events"] --> pick["best result selector rules"]
    pick --> hist["activity history query"]
    hist --> bulk["EmailVerifierBulkResults component"]
    bulk --> conf["confidence plus status display"]
    conf --> audit["audit log write or read path"]
    audit --> gate["2.3 release gate"]
micro_gate:
**Patch intent bands:** `.0` charter · `.1`–`.3` core path · `.4`–`.6` hardening · `.7`–`.8` integration · `.9` minor freeze / handoff.
Theme: **Canvas** — codenames in per-patch `2.3.P — *.md` files.
